home.title: Intelligent Proxy
home.subtitle: Operations Elevated
home.description: AI Ops and agentic AI that automates workflows, connects your stack, and helps teams run smarter, faster, and more efficient operations—from the control room to the front line.

hero.title: AI Ops & Agentic AI
hero.description: Intelligent Proxy designs and deploys agentic AI for real-world operations—systems that reason, use tools, and orchestrate work so your teams move faster with fewer manual steps and clearer outcomes.

howItWorks.title: How Intelligent Proxy Powers Operations
howItWorks.subtitle: From strategy to production, we build AI Ops and agentic systems that fit your processes, tools, and governance—so operations get smarter without adding chaos.

aiChat.title: Agentic AI in production
aiChat.description: We build autonomous agents that plan multi-step work, call APIs and internal tools, and execute workflows with guardrails—so routine and semi-routine operations scale without constant human babysitting.

knowledgeBase.title: Operational context & knowledge
knowledgeBase.description: We connect agents to the knowledge operations actually use: runbooks, SOPs, tickets, docs, and system metadata—so decisions and actions stay aligned with how your organization really runs.

multilingual.title: Global teams, one playbook
multilingual.description: Deploy agents and workflows across languages and regions so distributed teams share the same operational standards and faster handoffs.

learning.title: Continuous improvement
learning.description: Our systems learn from feedback, outcomes, and operational signals—tightening accuracy, reducing rework, and making your AI Ops investment compound over time.

about.title: About Intelligent Proxy
about.subtitle: AI Ops and agentic AI for high-performing operations

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Intelligent Proxy, we're on a mission to make operations smarter, faster, and more efficient through AI Ops and agentic AI. We believe teams shouldn't trade speed for safety—or quality for scale—when they automate real work.
mission.vision: Our vision is agentic systems that understand context, take bounded action, and improve over time—pairing human judgment with machine consistency so operations run reliably around the clock.

who.title: Who We Are
who.description: We are a team of AI experts and solution architects who have worked on groundbreaking projects across Germany, the UK, and Canada. Our passion lies in building AI agent solutions that help businesses drive more value.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.description: Combining deep technical knowledge with industry experience to deliver cutting-edge AI solutions

research.title: AI Research & Development
research.description: Our AI researchers and developers have deep expertise in machine learning, NLP, and agentic AI systems built for production operations.

architecture.title: Solution Architecture
architecture.description: Our solution architects design robust, scalable AI implementations that integrate seamlessly with existing business systems.

design.title: UX/UI Design
design.description: We design operator-friendly experiences so teams can supervise agents, review actions, and stay in control without fighting the tooling.

integration.title: Enterprise Integration
integration.description: With expertise in deploying AI solutions across various industries, we ensure smooth implementation in complex enterprise environments.

global.title: Global Experience
global.description: Our team brings diverse perspectives from working on AI projects across three continents, giving us unique insights into global operational and rollout requirements.

team.title: Cross-functional Team
team.description: Our experts span AI research, software engineering, UX design, and business strategy - creating holistic solutions that excel technically and commercially.

innovation.title: Innovation Focus
innovation.description: We stay at the edge of agentic AI, tool use, and workflow automation—bringing practical patterns into production, not just demos.

results.title: Results-Driven
results.description: We measure what operations care about: cycle time, error rates, throughput, and human time saved—so automation shows up in the metrics that matter.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We're constantly pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI technology.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We're committed to delivering solutions that exceed expectations in every way.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We work closely with our clients to ensure our solutions meet their specific needs.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We believe in transparent, ethical AI development and deployment.

cta.title: Ready to modernize operations with AI Ops and agentic AI?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our AI Ops and agentic AI services

questions.question: What is Intelligent Proxy?
questions.answer: Intelligent Proxy is an AI solutions partner focused on AI Ops and agentic AI for real operations. We help organizations design, integrate, and run autonomous agents and automated workflows that connect to your tools and knowledge—so teams execute faster with stronger consistency, visibility, and governance.

questions.question: How do I get started with Intelligent Proxy?
questions.answer: Getting started is simple. Contact our team to discuss your business needs, and we'll guide you through the process of developing a custom AI solution for your specific requirements. We offer flexible engagement models to suit businesses of all sizes.

questions.question: Can I customize my AI agents?
questions.answer: Absolutely! Customization is at the core of Intelligent Proxy's approach. Our team works closely with you to understand your business needs and develops AI agents trained on your specific knowledge base, adjusting their behavior, capabilities, and integration points to match your exact requirements.

questions.question: What languages do Intelligent Proxy agents support?
questions.answer: Our AI agents support multiple languages including English, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, and many more. We can develop solutions with support for additional languages based on your specific business needs.

questions.question: How secure is my data with Intelligent Proxy?
questions.answer: Security is our top priority. We employ enterprise-grade security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure access controls, and regular security audits. Your data is never used to train other clients' AI agents, ensuring complete confidentiality.

questions.question: Do I need technical expertise to work with Intelligent Proxy?
questions.answer: No deep ML expertise is required on your side. We handle architecture, integration, and rollout, and we train your operators on how to supervise agents, review outcomes, and iterate safely.
